# Talkie

Canonical site: https://usetalkie.com/
Last updated: 2026-07-08

Talkie is a local-first voice capture app for Mac, iPhone, and Apple Watch. It turns speech into dictation, searchable memos, files, drafts, workflow runs, and agent-readable context. Capture, local storage, files, clipboard, and shell workflows start on the user's devices. Outside model providers and webhooks are optional and run only when configured by the user.

## Primary pages

- Product homepage: https://usetalkie.com/
- Download for Mac: https://usetalkie.com/downloads/
- Mac app: https://usetalkie.com/mac/
- Mobile and Watch app: https://usetalkie.com/mobile/
- Security and privacy: https://usetalkie.com/security/
- Agent workflows: https://usetalkie.com/agents/

## Workflows

- Workflow overview: https://usetalkie.com/workflows/
- Downloadable workflow templates: https://usetalkie.com/workflows/templates/
- Dictate to Claude: https://usetalkie.com/workflows/dictate-to-claude/
- Dictate to Email: https://usetalkie.com/workflows/dictate-to-email/
- Voice Memo to Obsidian: https://usetalkie.com/workflows/voice-memo-to-obsidian/
- Iterate in Compose: https://usetalkie.com/workflows/iterate-in-compose/
- Quick Idea to CLI: https://usetalkie.com/workflows/quick-idea-to-cli/
- Bug Note to GitHub Issue: https://usetalkie.com/workflows/bug-note-to-github/

## Suggested short description

Talkie is a local-first voice capture app for Mac, iPhone, and Apple Watch. It captures speech, stores searchable transcripts, and can route voice into drafts, files, shell commands, workflows, and agent-readable CLI output. Cloud models and webhooks are optional; local capture and local files are the default path.
